headline: US tariff fight shifts to heavy machinery imported from Mexico
summary: Lawmakers say offshoring of farm and construction equipment production to Mexico threatens U.S. manufacturing and could trigger new tariffs. The post US tariff fight shifts to heavy machinery imported from Mexico appeared first on FreightWaves.

raw.headline: US tariff fight shifts to heavy machinery imported from Mexico

headline: Private sector hiring totaled 62,000 in March, better than expected, ADP says
summary: Private sector employment growth kept pace, but health care and construction continued to provide nearly all the momentum.

raw.headline: Private sector hiring totaled 62,000 in March, better than expected, ADP says
